name: Phase 11 Integrations and migration requirements matrix

rows.requirement: Integration adapter foundation and ExternalMapping model
evidence: Phase 11 contract defines adapter foundation, ExternalMapping, idempotency, permissions, and E2E expectations before implementation.
tests: Pending P11-001 implementation: expected unit tests under packages/integrations and access-control permission tests.
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation: cleanup must prove deterministic fixture reset for mappings, idempotency state, sync audit, and adapter mode.
rows.blocker: 2026-05-17T05:55:38.9918634+07:00: P11-001 implementation has not started; this contract block only defines required adapter/mapping scope and verifier tracking.

evidence: Phase 11 contract requires a non-mutating mock adapter preview mapping external payloads to canonical opportunity/project/task data.
tests: Pending P11-002 implementation: expected preview/domain tests proving no mutation and validation report contents.
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation: cleanup must restore preview tokens, external payload fixtures, and canonical entities created during tests.
rows.blocker: 2026-05-17T05:55:38.9918634+07:00: P11-002 product code is not implemented yet; preview behavior is specified but has no executable domain evidence.

rows.requirement: Idempotent import apply and mapping persistence
evidence: Phase 11 contract requires repeated imports to reuse tenant-scoped mappings and avoid duplicate canonical records.
tests: Pending P11-003 implementation: expected idempotency and mapping persistence unit/API tests.
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation: cleanup must reset import batches, idempotency keys, mappings, and canonical readbacks.
rows.blocker: 2026-05-17T05:55:38.9918634+07:00: P11-003 implementation has not started; no idempotent apply command or mapping readback exists yet.

rows.requirement: Sync audit, retry/rate-limit, and safe failure model
evidence: Phase 11 contract requires structured adapter failures, rate-limit/retry metadata, safe diagnostics, and no partial canonical mutation.
tests: Pending P11-004 implementation: expected failure-mode domain/API tests and audit readback tests.
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation: cleanup must reset adapter failure modes, retry counters, sync audit events, and failed import batches.
rows.blocker: 2026-05-17T05:55:38.9918634+07:00: P11-004 implementation has not started; failure diagnostics and retry/rate-limit model are contract-only.

rows.requirement: Migration validation report and dry-run summary
evidence: Phase 11 contract requires import preview to return validation reports with creates, updates, skips, errors, blockers, and recovery text.
tests: Pending P11-005 implementation: expected validation report and dry-run summary tests.
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation: cleanup must reset validation reports and prove dry-run summaries did not persist canonical changes.
rows.blocker: 2026-05-17T05:55:38.9918634+07:00: P11-005 implementation has not started; migration validation reports have no executable API evidence yet.

rows.requirement: Integrations API and governed import commands
evidence: Phase 11 contract defines adapter, connection, import preview/apply, batch, mapping, audit, and diagnostics API contracts.
tests: Pending P11-006 implementation: expected API integration tests for preview/apply, permissions, tenant isolation, stale preview, invalid payload, and failure recovery.
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation: cleanup must reset API runtime import state, mapping state, audit/action evidence, and adapter modes.
rows.blocker: 2026-05-17T05:55:38.9918634+07:00: P11-006 API runtime/routes are not implemented yet; direct API evidence is unavailable.

evidence: Phase 11 contract defines a Russian Integration Admin Diagnostics control surface with preview/apply, mapping diagnostics, failure panel, and audit readback.
tests: Pending P11-007 implementation: expected component/UI tests for loading, empty, error, denied, preview, apply readback, stale preview, failure, and mapping diagnostics.
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation: cleanup must prove UI reload/readback and reset for import results, failure state, and mapping diagnostics.
rows.blocker: 2026-05-17T05:55:38.9918634+07:00: P11-007 UI is not implemented yet; no component or browser evidence exists.

evidence: Phase 11 contract requires imported canonical projects and tasks to remain operable after the adapter is disconnected or failing.
tests: Pending P11-008 implementation: expected API/UI tests proving imported project continuity without live adapter dependency.
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation: cleanup must reset imported canonical entities and adapter disconnect/failure mode after continuity tests.
rows.blocker: 2026-05-17T05:55:38.9918634+07:00: P11-008 continuity proof is not implemented yet; E2E-103 is still planned.

evidence: Phase 11 contract defines deterministic fixtures and required executable Playwright scenarios E2E-100..104.
tests: Pending P11-009 implementation: expected fixture tests and npm run test:e2e:phase -- --phase 11 evidence.
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation: cleanup must prove /test-fixtures/reset restores adapters, imports, mappings, audit, canonical imported entities, and adapter modes.
rows.blocker: 2026-05-17T05:55:38.9918634+07:00: P11-009 deterministic fixtures and E2E-100..104 do not exist yet; no phase E2E evidence can be recorded.

rows.requirement: Phase 11 verification matrix and exit gate
evidence: Verifier support is being added for P11 required rows and E2E-100..104 paths; strict exit remains blocked until product implementation and phase E2E pass.
tests: Pending P11-010 strict exit: node scripts/verify-requirements-matrix.mjs docs/status/phase11-requirements-matrix.json must pass only after all rows are verified.
rows.cleanup: Pending phase exit: cleanup evidence must aggregate Phase 11 fixture reset, API/domain readback, audit/mapping readback, reload persistence, and adapter failure reset.
rows.blocker: 2026-05-17T05:55:38.9918634+07:00: P11-010 strict exit is blocked because P11-001..P11-009 and E2E-100..104 are not implemented yet.
